div1.entryFree: Unluckily, unfortunately: Err. V, 125. Shr. IV, 5, 25. Wint. III, 2, 100. Rom. III, 4, 1. Tim. III, 2, 51. Peculiar use: if like an ill venture it come u. home, H4B V, 5, 128 (in an unlucky plight or state). things u. charge my fantasy, Caes. III, 3, 2 (in an unlucky manner, so as to foreshow some misfortune. cf. we have safely found our king, Tp. V, 221. Tp. V, 221 if a son do sinfully miscarry, H5 IV, 1, 155. see Appendix. Most M. Edd. unlucky; others unlikely).
